title: Python If and Else
simple: If checks a condition. If it is true, one block runs. If false, another block can run.
advanced: Conditional branching controls program flow by evaluating boolean expressions and selecting execution paths.
explanation: This lesson teaches how a program makes decisions using conditions.
lineExplanations: Line 1: Store student marks in a variable.
Line 2: Check if marks are at least 50.
Line 5: Print Try Again when condition is false.
